title: Invisible User
description: Invisible User Mod: Blocks and removes player invisibility, keeping all players visible. Includes a toggle key (config), ModMenu support, works on client and server, and has zero performance impact.
body:
Invisible User Mod

by zxNoragami

A Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21 that ensures all players remain visible by blocking and removing invisibility effects from any player.

Overview

Invisible User removes and prevents the invisibility status effect from all players, guaranteeing fully visible gameplay on PvP servers or anti-cheat environments.

Features

• Toggle on/off with a customizable keybind (default: I)
• ModMenu integration for easy configuration
• Settings save automatically
• Works on both client and server
• Zero performance impact

How to Use

Quick Toggle: Press I (or your custom keybind) to enable or disable the mod instantly.
ModMenu: Open ModMenu → find Invisible User → toggle it from the config screen.

Installation

Install Fabric Loader for Minecraft 1.21

Install Fabric API

(Optional) Install ModMenu

Place the mod .jar in your mods folder

Launch and enjoy!

Requirements
<details> <summary>Show Requirements</summary>

• Minecraft 1.21
• Fabric Loader 0.16.0+
• Fabric API 0.98.1+1.21+
• ModMenu (optional)

</details>
Optional

You may embed a showcase video or screenshots above if desired.

Recommendation

For best compatibility, Fabric Loader 0.17.x+ and Fabric API 0.102.x+1.21 are recommended.


✅ Recommendation
